news.title: AI Updates Today (March 2026) – Latest AI Model Releases
news.snippet: Major contributors include OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Meta AI, Mistral AI, xAI, DeepSeek, Alibaba (Qwen), and many others. LLM Stats updates this page hourly to capture new model releases and API changes.

news.title: LLM News Today (March 2026) – AI Model Releases
news.snippet: A comprehensive guide to Google DeepMind's Gemini 3.1 Pro — the most advanced Pro-tier model as of February 2026, featuring a 1M-token context window, 77.1% on ARC-AGI-2, multimodal reasoning across text, images, audio, video, and code.

news.title: Google DeepMind - Project Genie Released
news.snippet: On January 29, 2026, DeepMind released Project Genie to AI Ultra subscribers. In March 2025, DeepMind launched two AI models, Gemini Robotics.

tech.title: The Complete Prompt Engineering for AI Bootcamp (2026)
tech.snippet: Learn practical coding skills for working professionally with AI, including GPT-5, Veo3 & Midjourney

tech.title: Prompt engineering - Wikipedia
tech.snippet: The process of writing and refining a prompt for an LLM or generative AI shares some parallels with an iterative engineering design process, such as by discovering reusable best practices through reproducible experimentation.

tech.title: Prompt Engineering Best Practices in 2026: The Ultimate Guide
tech.snippet: Ask for code plus a verification checklist. Force the model to validate its own output against your constraints. 400ms response time maintains flow state.
